chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.D-572 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of main case. 19.11.2025 Mr. Mir Muhammad Nohri advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. Sindh Liaquat Ali ADC-I and Irfan Ali Mari Office Superintendent Regional Revenue Office Mirpurkhas on behalf of Secretary Revenue Board of Revenue Sindh/respondent No.3. Petitioner is differently abled person claim appointment in a suitable job under the differently abled quota. The A.D.C. present in Court has submitted a report of Deputy Commissioner, Tharparkar with the narration that there is no vacancy available against 5% quota of differently abled persons except only three posts of Sweepers. A.D.C., however, states that as and when positions occur, the recruitment process would be carried out for necessary compliance of the directions of this court and accordingly the petitioner will be accommodated. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied with the above statement and seeks disposal of this petition in terms of the statement made by Deputy Commissioner filed today. Without touching the merits of the case, this petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
